query: Add a GET /reports endpoint to our multi-tenant FastAPI + Supabase/Postgres SaaS that returns the calling tenant's reports.
expected_behavior: Takes the tenant id from the verified bearer token / RLS-scoped session, never from a client-supplied parameter
Relies on Row-Level Security for tenant scoping and opens an RLS-scoped transaction (auth as a Depends())
Writes a tenant-isolation test that asserts a DENY (tenant A cannot read tenant B), not just an allow, at both pgTAP and HTTP layers
Treats this as Tier-2 posture and points to references/databases.md + references/testing.md
anti_behavior: Accepts tenant_id as a query/path parameter from the client
Tests only that a tenant sees its own rows
source: references/testing.md §2 + python-web-apis.md (the un-skippable tenant-isolation test, v4.0)
